//: Compiles the Booking.com report CORE graph (src/lib/channel/booking-com-reports-core.ts and its imports) to CommonJS in dist/check/, so scripts/check-booking-com-reports.mjs can drive the real guards against a disposable database. Inherits every constraint of tsconfig.worker.json — nothing in this graph may import next/*, react or a server action, and tsc fails here if one sneaks in. That is the point: the guards worth testing are the ones that do not need Next.
